title: EBS Testimonial Film
summary: A cinematic testimonial film for Eaton Business School's international DBA and EMBA audience.
overview: A polished testimonial film produced for Eaton Business School, built to speak to an international executive-education audience. The piece pairs authentic student voices with a restrained, premium visual language that reflects the school's brand.
challenge: Testimonial content often feels flat and corporate. The goal was to keep the interviews genuine while elevating the production so it felt closer to a brand film than a talking-head video.
approach: Careful framing, controlled lighting and considered gaze direction gave the interviews a cinematic feel. Motion-graphics packages and brand-aligned typography were built in After Effects to reinforce the school's identity, with colour grading tuned to the brand palette.
results: A reusable, brand-consistent testimonial format that the school can extend across future campaigns.
